texto: You've got to have faith to make the journey. For some, it might take 40 days; for others, 40 years. And, unfortunately, there will be many that will never see their promise become a reality at all - not because God can't do it - because they don't have the faith to believe that he really can
explicacao: Citação de Hannah Keeley sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “You've got to have faith to make the journey. For some, it might take 40 days; for others, 40 yea…” articula fe, christian-living, reflexao em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como viagem e reflexao.
